scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @groweasy/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @groweasy/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @groweasy/web build
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @groweasy/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @groweasy/shared test && corepack pnpm --filter @groweasy/api test
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @groweasy/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @groweasy/shared typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @groweasy/api typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @groweasy/web typecheck
